name: Tempest Security AB (publ)
summary: Tempest Security AB (publ) provides solutions for security and protection in Sweden. The company offers security services focusing on service-intensive environments, including preventive services, security guards, receptionists and caretakers, specially trained security personnel, installation of alarm and surveillance technology, training personnel, investigations and consultation, and surveillance services. It also provides training courses in dignitary, security and protection, workplace safety, fire training, and personal safety for women. In addition, the company offers safety technology, and alarm center and monitoring services. It serves real estate, events, hotels and restaurants, industry, offices, shops and malls, and state and local authorities; and individuals. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
